method: read-only scan of 200+ repo READMEs + manifests; identified clusters solving the same problem with divergent approaches

clusters.differences: Tracely = Rust-only unified facade over tracing/metrics/opentelemetry. PhenoObservability = Rust observability stack with multi-lang bindings. ObservabilityKit = polyglot OTel SDKs (Rust/Py/Go/TS).
clusters.recommendation: Tracely should be the canonical Rust facade; ObservabilityKit the polyglot SDK layer; PhenoObservability demoted to a thin PhenoKits re-export. Document the layering in an ADR.

clusters.differences: phenotype-shared and phenoShared are duplicates (same name, same mission). phenoUtils = primitive tier (crypto/fs/net/shell). HexaKit = 46-crate hexagonal-ports workspace. phenotype-tooling = CI reusables.
clusters.recommendation: Merge phenotype-shared into phenoShared (the active one); have HexaKit consume phenoUtils as the primitive tier; phenotype-tooling stays CI-only.

clusters.differences: PhenoMCP/PhenoMCP-cheap = Rust experimental scaffolds. McpKit = polyglot framework SDK. cheap-llm-mcp = Python FastMCP LLM router. dispatch-mcp = tier-dispatch tool. AgentMCP = empty placeholder.
clusters.recommendation: Make McpKit the canonical MCP framework; retire PhenoMCP-cheap (it self-identifies as superseded by Python FastMCP); have cheap-llm-mcp + dispatch-mcp be McpKit consumers. Archive AgentMCP placeholder.

clusters.differences: Agentora = Rust hexagonal agent framework with skills/tool-registry/memory. PhenoAgent = distributed orchestration framework with plugins/skills/multi-model. phenoAI = AI provider client crates. agent-platform = hexagonal monorepo that explicitly absorbs the agent cluster.
clusters.recommendation: agent-platform is the declared sink; migrate Agentora + PhenoAgent crates into it as adapters/ports. phenoAI becomes the LlmProvider port impl. Avoid three Rust agent frameworks.

clusters.differences: phenotype-bus = generic async pub/sub. Eventra = CQRS + event sourcing + projections. Tokn = token ledger but also contains the canonical Rust routing substrate per ADR-001.
clusters.recommendation: phenotype-bus is the low-level transport; Eventra layers CQRS on top. Clarify in ADR that Tokn's routing module is the routing substrate (already canonical) and that phenotype-bus must not duplicate route selection.

additional_signals: Three distinct 'shared' namespaces (phenotype-shared, phenoShared, phenotype-shared-TYPESCRIPT) are a documentation smell
heliosCLI and helioscope are the same README (helioscope is a redirect/fork)
AppGen self-identifies as archived-candidate — close the 6 stale Dependabot PRs
next_steps: Open one consolidation ADR per cluster; stage migrations in repo-specific worktrees per Worktree Commandments.
